title: Comprehensive Quick Review
description: Review cards with questions from all modules.

cards.front: What is the difference between Present Simple and Present Continuous?
cards.back: Simple = habits/facts (I work). Continuous = now/temporary (I am working).
cards.example: I work every day. / I am working right now.

cards.front: How is the Present Perfect formed?
cards.example: I have visited Paris. She has finished.

cards.front: When to use Past Simple vs Present Perfect?
cards.back: Past Simple = время definido (yesterday). Present Perfect = experiencia/resultado.
cards.example: I went yesterday. / I have been there (alguna vez).

cards.front: How is the First Conditional formed?
cards.back: If + present simple, will + base verb
cards.example: If it rains, I will stay home.

cards.front: How is the Second Conditional formed?
cards.back: If + past simple, would + base verb
cards.example: If I had money, I would travel.

cards.front: How is the Passive Voice formed?
cards.example: The book was written by Tolkien.

cards.front: What are defining vs non-defining relative clauses?
cards.back: Defining = essential (no commas). Non-defining = extra info (with commas).
cards.example: The man who called is my boss. / My boss, who is 40, called.
I'm feeling under the weather today.

cards.front: What is the difference between "make" and "do"?
How is Direct → Reported Speech transformed?
cards.back: Change tense back (backshift), change pronouns/time words.
cards.example: "I am happy" → He said he was happy.

cards.front: What is the difference between "interesting" and "interested"?
cards.example: The movie is interesting. I am interested.

pairs.left: If it rains, I will stay.
The book was written by J.K.
If I had money, I would travel.
The man who called is my dad.

title: Advanced Mixed Construction
description: Order sentences from different grammatical topics.

sentences.correct: I have never been to Japan
If you study hard you will pass
The cake was made by my grandmother
She said she was coming tomorrow
The teacher who helped me was kind

title: Quiz Final Integral
description: Final exam with questions from all modules.

questions.question: "She ___ to the gym every Monday." (Present Simple)
"I ___ already finished my homework." (Present Perfect)
questions.explanation: have/has + past participle. I HAVE finished.

questions.question: "If I ___ rich, I would buy a yacht." (2nd Conditional)
questions.explanation: 2nd conditional: If + past simple (were for formal).

questions.question: "The letter ___ written by my friend." (Passive Voice)
"He said he ___ tired." (Reported Speech — backshift from "is")
"The woman ___ lives next door is a doctor." (Relative Clause)
questions.explanation: "Who" for people as subject of the clause.

questions.question: "It's ___ cats and dogs!" (Idiom = raining hard)
questions.explanation: It's raining cats and dogs = raining cats and dogs.

questions.question: "I ___ 30 years old." (Correct form)
questions.explanation: English uses "be" for age: I AM 30 years old.

questions.question: "She ___ be at home — her car is there." (Modal = deduction)
"If it rains, I ___ stay home." (1st Conditional)
questions.explanation: 1st conditional: If + present, will + base verb.

questions.question: "I have lived here ___ 2010." (since/for)
questions.explanation: Since + specific point in time. For + duration.

questions.question: "___ you ever been to London?" (Present Perfect question)

title: Repaso Final
description: Unscramble words from the comprehensive review.
